rationale_source: R11-B intake-time broker contradiction (BW=CT): F1.LA broker_initial_intent vs docs at single message; F2.DH triggered by R11-B intake-discrepancy detection

requested_loan_amount.rationale: Broker email asserts $325k; loan_app $185k. F1.LA broker_initial_intent wins per R10-G; loan_app value below 30% suppression threshold but still flagged.

discrepancyHold.rationale: 75% discrepancy (broker vs loan_app) → R11-B-1 Layer 1 suppression + F2.DH activation. Distinct from A08: contradiction is INTAKE-time, not post-intake correction (BW=CT vs CR).

must_not_include.rationale: Suppressed loan_app value not presented as canonical.
